title: Tangy Flaky Uruguayan Tuna Tartare
description: A vibrant, protein-packed tartare featuring fresh tuna, tangy lime, raspberry vinaigrette, and crisp cucumber, finished with a subtle white wine deglaze.

ingredients.name: fresh tuna steak
ingredients.notes: fresh, sushi grade, cut into 1 cm cubes

instructions: Place the diced tuna in a shallow bowl and drizzle with lime juice, white wine vinegar, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper; gently toss to coat and let it marinate for 10 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine the diced red onion, cucumber, avocado, capers, and chopped cilantro.
Add the marinated tuna to the veggie mixture and fold gently to combine.
Drizzle the olive oil and raspberry vinaigrette over the mixture; adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if needed.
Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for at least 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Serve the tartare in chilled glasses or on a bed of crisp greens, garnishing with a few fresh cilantro leaves or a drizzle of raspberry vinaigrette.
Offer toasted rye crackers or a small side of grilled bread if desired for added texture.
Enjoy the vibrant, flaky bite of this Uruguayan-inspired tartare!
